content.en:
The Bright Moon Fairy then retreated.

"The Bright Moon Fairy continues to stay in the Heavenly Pavilion, and the development speed of the Heavenly Pavilion will not be affected, and I will worry less about it. However, the most important thing at the moment is strength!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Nowadays, his strength has improved rapidly, and compared to 10,000 years ago, his strength has skyrocketed.

Originally, his Chaos Golden Desolate Technique was only the fifth layer of the Dacheng Realm, but now he used 10,000 years of time, coupled with the assistance of many treasures, among them, he found some treasures that could assist the cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and accelerated his cultivation.

After a long period of penance and a large amount of resources, he finally cultivated the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the fifth level of perfection, and also cultivated his physical body to the limit.

In addition, Ye Tian has also made rapid progress in other aspects, such as the Hell Divine Sky Spear has been cultivated to the Dacheng realm, which is a great progress, if it is replaced by someone else, no matter how high the talent is, it will be difficult to improve a space great divine power from the Xiaocheng realm to the Dacheng realm in 10,000 years, even if he has the ability to accelerate time, he will never be able to do it.

This is mainly due to the fact that Ye Tian had absorbed a trace of the origin of the universe, which was the true origin, and it was a trace of origin that the transcendent person had confronted with the origin of the universe and cut off from the origin of the universe.

This trace of origin allowed Ye Tian to comprehend many rules, and also witnessed the evolution of countless laws, which was equivalent to absorbing countless Heavenly Dao words in an instant.

Therefore, his cultivation of the Great Divine Power was not restricted, while others could not do it so far.

Ye Tian even felt that many Space Supremes couldn't cultivate a Spatial Great Divine Power to the Dacheng realm, maybe they were still in the Xiaocheng realm.

In addition, the Wheel of Time, a great time supernatural power, was also cultivated to the Dacheng realm by Ye Tian, and the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel was realized by Ye Tianshen to the peak realm of Dacheng, and he was only one step away from stepping into the realm of perfection.

In addition, the realm of the Chaos Dao was also at the limit of the Law Phase Realm, and it was only one step away from completely stepping into the Origin Realm.

It's a pity that Ye Tian needs to cultivate too many aspects, so if he scatters his cultivation, his progress will not be as fast as he imagined, otherwise if he cultivates only one door, his progress will be faster.

"The next step is to impact the Universe God Realm, my accumulation has reached the extreme, and it is difficult to make progress in other aspects. After breaking through from the galaxy level to the cosmic god, people's comprehension will undergo a transformation, and even an ordinary galaxy level can create some powerful secret techniques after becoming a cosmic god. In short, the more galaxy-level impacts that accumulate into the Cosmic God Realm, the greater the transformation. With my accumulation and potential, I will definitely transform and grow. Moreover, with my current combat strength, I don't have to be afraid of the so-called Thunder Tribulation. "

Ye Tian thought so.

The impact on the realm of the cosmic god is mainly to transform the inner world into a small universe in the body, and the power of the small universe is a very advanced power, similar to the power of heaven and earth in the universe, and it is completely controlled by the cosmic god.

The cosmic god even mobilized the power of the small universe to suppress a void, and could even achieve the effect of condensing time and space.

In addition, becoming a cosmic god, the body will also usher in a small transformation.

For example, in this era of the universe, no matter how much the origin of the universe suppresses the cultivation of the physical body, so that the existence above the god level cannot cultivate the physical strength, but after the galaxy level breaks through to the realm of the cosmic god, the vitality is comparable to the fourth-order life, and the body is equivalent to the pseudo-fourth-order.

This is the rule set by the Great Dao, and even the origin of the universe cannot be changed.

And Ye Tian is now a sixth-order life, once he hits the realm of the Universe God, his body will also usher in a small transformation.

It is impossible to directly transform from the sixth order to the seventh order, but it is possible to ascend by a small stage or two.

For example, if he is now in the early stage of the sixth order, he may be able to rise to the middle life level of the sixth order, or the late life level of the sixth order.

No matter how much it is improved, it is a huge improvement for Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Terran territory and came to the edge of the universe.

He has to hit the bottleneck again and meet the thunderstorm.

He didn't tell anyone else about this time.

......

The edge of the universe.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in the void and began to operate the galaxy-level secret technique of impacting the cosmic god realm, so that the world in his body began to transform towards the small universe.

The transformation of the inner world into a small universe is not to open up the world and expand the world, then it will not be able to transform successfully.

The real metamorphosis is to compress the inner world at the beginning, form a source point, and then detonate the source point, simulating the scene of the Big Bang to form a small universe.

This may seem very dangerous, but as long as the talent reaches the Universe level, it is not a big problem.

But if the talent can't reach the universe level, you won't be able to complete the breakthrough, and if you force the breakthrough, the whole person will explode into nothingness.

This is also the reason why the galaxy level with insufficient talent can only stay at the galaxy level for the rest of his life, and he does not dare to impact the realm of the universe god.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's internal world slowly compressed into a source point.

At this time, Ye Tian's breath was almost none, after all, the strength of his whole body was equal to a little concentration, and it was naturally difficult for the outside world to sense the breath.

"Boom!"

Ye Tian shouted in his heart.

Bang!!!!

In the void in the body, the source point exploded, opening up a void in the underworld.

Then, countless galaxies, galaxies, and planets were born, and small cosmic barriers were rapidly formed.

It all seemed like it had been happening for a long time, but it was all done in an instant.

After about a few months, Ye Tian finally sensed that the small universe had initially stabilized.

"My little universe is so big!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had also observed the small universe formed after others broke through to the realm of cosmic gods, and compared to others, his small universe was at least a hundred times larger.

"It seems that it is because my potential is too terrifying that such a powerful small universe has been formed!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, he took out a large amount of Chaos Rare Earth.

If you want to stabilize the small universe in a short period of time, Chaos Rare Earth is undoubtedly a very good treasure.

And this time, he also prepared a large number of Chaos rare earths, and if the time is accelerated, the small universe can be completely stabilized in a month or two.

Whoa!!

A large amount of chaotic rare earth was sucked into the small universe by Ye Tian and integrated into the cosmic barrier of the small universe, making the small universe slowly stable and powerful.

At this time, Ye Tiancai could be regarded as truly stepping into the realm of the cosmic gods.

At this moment, the Endless Thunder Tribulation Cloud in the Void was born.

His own thunderstorm has arrived!
